name: 25 MG Clomifene Tablets IP
about: 25 MG Clomifene Tablets IP is a highly effective medication used to treat infertility in women. The medicine is made in India and comes in a pack of 30 tablets. The tablets are in the physical form and should be stored in a cool and dry place. The medicine is classified as a general medicine and should be taken as per the doctors instructions. Each tablet contains 25mg of Clomifene, which helps stimulate ovulation in women who have difficulty conceiving. The medicine is safe and has been approved by medical professionals worldwide.

faq.q: What is 25 MG Clomifene Tablets IP used for?
faq.a: 25 MG Clomifene Tablets IP is used to treat infertility in women by helping to stimulate ovulation.

faq.q: How should I store the tablets?
faq.a: The tablets should be stored in a cool and dry place.

faq.q: How many tablets are there in a pack?
faq.a: There are 30 tablets in each pack.
Yes, the medicine is safe and has been approved by medical professionals worldwide.

faq.q: How should I take the medicine?
faq.a: The medicine should be taken as per the doctors instructions.
